# Golden Principles Skill (Minimal)

**10 Principles** — (1) Repo is system of record, (2) Map not manual, (3) Enforce invariants not implementations, (4) Parse at boundaries, (5) AVM-first + security baseline always, (6) Golden path pattern, (7) Encode human taste, (8) Context is scarce, (9) Progressive disclosure, (10) Mechanical enforcement over documentation.

**ALZ Application** — Estate state in alz-recall, security baseline as invariant, AVM for both IaC tracks, context-shredding tiers, validator scripts for mechanical enforcement.

**How to Apply** — Agents read this first; contributors encode lessons into rules; reviewers check golden path and context impact.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
